embeds.description: "She is the flag fluttering high while the ship sails, guiding its direction, and also the dirge that holds its duty until the very last moment when the ship sinks. Her responsibility, her duty, her life are bound to the ship; there is nothing else. Because guiding the course is the meaning of her e
